page.title: Simple Captain Manager Texts
page.t: Simple Captain Manager
Auto Assign Captain
Dismiss Captain
Fire Captain
Allows batch personnel management for captains of selected ships in the right-click interaction menu.
Transfer Unassigned Crew
Use Seminars
Dismissed %1 captain(s).
Assigned captains to %1 ship(s).
Fired %1 captain(s).
Automatically assigns unassigned crew to captains based on priority.
Dismissed %2-star captain [%3] of ship %1.
Fired %2-star captain [%3] of ship %1.
Assigned %2-star captain [%3] to ship %1.
Transferred %2 unassigned crew to %1.
Seminar training complete: Promoted %1 captains. [Consumed: basic x%2, 1-star x%3, 2-star x%4, 3-star x%5, 4-star x%6]
[Warning] To make room for the dismissed captain on ship %1, the lowest skilled crew member (%2-star [%3]) was automatically fired.
[Warning] Lack of unassigned crew; failed to assign captains to %1 of %2 requested ships.
Due to limited capacity on %1, only %2 out of %3 available unassigned crew members were transferred.
[Warning] Lack of unassigned crew; failed to assign a captain to ship %1.
Dismisses the captain and changes their status to unassigned personnel.
No captain to dismiss.
A captain is already assigned to this ship.
Immediately fires the captain.
No captain to fire.
Train captains using crew seminars currently held in your inventory.
No captain to train.
[Warning] There are no unassigned crew members available in the galaxy to transfer to %1.
Drop Cargo
Ejected all cargo (%2 types of wares) of ship %1 into space.
Ejects all cargo into space.
No cargo to drop.
Transfers unassigned crew members to fill the ship according to priority.
Assign Captain
Use Seminars
Other Captain Functions
Assign 5-Star only
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill of 5-star to the captain slot.
Assign All Unassigned
Assign 3-Star or higher only
Assign 2-Star or higher only
Assign under 2-Star only
Assign 4-Star or higher only
Assign 1-Star or higher only
Assign under 5-Star only
Assign under 4-Star only
Assign under 3-Star only
Assign under 1-Star only
Train to Max Skill (use all seminars sequentially)
Train to 4-Star (use up to 3-star seminars)
Train to 3-Star (use up to 2-star seminars)
Use only 1 seminar (original behavior)
Train to 2-Star (use up to 1-star seminars)
Train to 1-Star (use basic seminars)
Assigns unassigned crew members in the galaxy to the captain slot, regardless of skill.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill of 3-star or higher (skill value 9+) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill of 2-star or higher (skill value 6+) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill under 2-star (skill value under 6) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill of 4-star or higher (skill value 12+) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill of 1-star or higher (skill value 3+) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill under 5-star (skill value under 15) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill under 4-star (skill value under 12) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill under 3-star (skill value under 9) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill under 1-star (skill value under 3) to the captain slot.
Sequentially consumes all available seminars (0-4 star) in your inventory to train the captain's piloting skill to 5-star (max).
Sequentially consumes basic to 3-star seminars to train piloting skill up to 4-star. (Saves 4-star seminars)
Sequentially consumes basic to 2-star seminars to train piloting skill up to 3-star. (Saves 3 and 4-star seminars)
Consumes 1 seminar appropriate for the captain's current skill to promote the piloting skill by 1 tier.
Sequentially consumes basic to 1-star seminars to train piloting skill up to 2-star. (Saves 2, 3 and 4-star seminars)
Sequentially consumes basic seminars to train piloting skill up to 1-star. (Saves 1, 2, 3 and 4-star seminars)
The target ship or station has no free space.
The ship's crew quarters are full. To make room for the dismissed captain, the lowest-skilled crew member will be automatically fired.
Some ships have full crew quarters. To make room for the dismissed captains, the lowest-skilled crew member on those ships will be automatically fired.
Lacks the Basic Seminar required for this training.
Lacks the Seminars [Basic or 1-Star] required for this training.
Lacks the Seminars [Basic, 1-Star, or 2-Star] required for this training.
Lacks the Seminars [Basic, 1-Star, 2-Star, or 3-Star] required for this training.
There are no Seminars in your inventory.
Lacks required seminars for this training. [Missing: Basic Seminar x%1]
Lacks required seminars for this training. [Missing: Basic x%1, 1-Star x%2]
Lacks required seminars for this training. [Missing: Basic x%1, 1-Star x%2, 2-Star x%3]
Lacks required seminars for this training. [Missing: Basic x%1, 1-Star x%2, 2-Star x%3, 3-Star x%4]
Lacks required seminars for this training. [Missing: Basic x%1, 1-Star x%2, 2-Star x%3, 3-Star x%4, 4-Star x%5]
Train to 5-Star
Sequentially consumes basic to 4-star seminars to train piloting skill to 5-star [max]. [Disabled if seminars are lacking]
